prerequisites.value: Weapon Focus ( whip ), Whip Mastery, base attack bonus +8.

description.value:
**Benefit:** When you perform a drag combat maneuver with your whip, you can choose not to move with your target, instead bringing your target closer to you. If you do this, you canât drag the target any farther than the distance it takes to move it adjacent to you, even if your result was high enough to drag the target farther. You gain a +2 bonus on drag combat maneuver checks when using a whip to drag, but this bonus doesnât stack with the bonus from Improved Drag.

**Special:** Balor Whip counts as Improved Drag for the purpose of qualifying for Quick Drag.
